node.constraint: Initialize a better-sqlite3 database named 'shop.db'. Create a 'products' table with columns id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), name (TEXT), price (REAL), description (TEXT), image (TEXT). If the table is newly created, seed it with 5 sample products (e.g. Echo Dot, Kindle E-reader, Fire TV Stick, Wireless Headphones). Implement a GET handler returning all products as JSON.

Create a products catalog view at app/products/page.tsx (styled with beautiful Tailwind grid). Fetch the products from '/api/products' on mount. Display them with product cards showing image, title, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button calling the cart addition logic via fetch POST request to '/api/cart'. Include a navbar linking to Home ('/') and Cart ('/cart').
